title: psychotria involucrata
intro: Psychotria involucrata, also known as Jamaican dogwood, is a plant species native to the Caribbean and Central America, known for its medicinal and therapeutic properties. The plant contains a number of bioactive compounds, including nortropine alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal effects. The medicinal properties of Psychotria involucrata have been used to treat anxiety, insomnia, and other conditions related to stress and anxiety, with the health benefits including reduced anxiety and improved sleep quality. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, extracts, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
